what_broke: Two profiles for the same events under different slugs: landrun-100.json duplicate of mid-south.json, and sbt-grvl.json duplicate of steamboat-gravel.json, inflating the race count
root_cause: AI-generated/batch-research profiles created the same race twice under alternate slug spellings
fix_applied: Removed landrun-100.json (kept mid-south.json) and sbt-grvl.json (kept steamboat-gravel.json)
regression_check: immune_check.py check_fuzzy_duplicates() — fuzzy name-similarity >= 0.88 flags near-duplicate slugs
verified: immune_check.py 2026-07-11: neither landrun-100.json nor sbt-grvl.json present; 757 profiles

what_broke: Bare /methodology/ path 404'd — the canonical page lives at /race/methodology/ and nothing redirected the bare path
root_cause: The .htaccess rewrite rules generated by push_wordpress.py had no rule for the bare /methodology/ path
fix_applied: Added `RewriteRule ^methodology/?$ /race/methodology/ [R=301,L]` to push_wordpress.py's generated rewrite rules (commit 01ce8558)
regression_check: immune_check.py --live run_live_link_check() flags any dead same-site link as a YELLOW dead-link finding

what_broke: balatonfondo's published tier (T2) had drifted from its web-verified vitals — rankings claims had gone stale for months without re-verification
root_cause: No process re-verified published distance/elevation/field-size/prestige inputs against the live event after initial scoring
fix_applied: scripts/verify_race_rankings.py web-verified the vitals, recomputed Length/Elevation criteria from docs/GRAVEL_GOD_SCORING_SYSTEM.md, and recalculated overall_score/tier — balatonfondo dropped T2->T3 (commit 473c935d)
regression_check: immune_check.py run_profile_audit() (audit_race_data.audit_race) flags any future TIER MISMATCH between overall_score and tier; scripts/verify_race_rankings.py runs weekly (Thursdays) via .github/workflows/rankings-veracity.yml
verified: immune_check.py 2026-07-11: race-data/balatonfondo.json tier=3, score=56 (consistent, no TIER MISMATCH)

what_broke: 10 races had overall_score ~3pts higher than their criteria justified (violated round((sum_14+cultural_impact)/70*100))
root_cause: scores set/imported higher than criteria; cultural_impact=0 so not explained by bonus
fix_applied: recomputed overall_score for 10 races (Codex, human-verified 10/10); gfny-miami T3->T4
regression_check: immune_check.py score-math detector flags any overall_score != recomputed

what_broke: 11 races duplicated under spelling/hyphenation variants (e.g. granfondo-strade-bianche vs strade-bianche-gran-fondo)
root_cause: same event ingested twice with slug variants
fix_applied: removed 11 non-canonical dups (kept fuller/standard-spelling twin), regenerated index to 746; 5 L'Etape/Tor-Divide false positives left intact

root_cause: STALE deployed pages emitted a /tires/ link the current guarded generator no longer emits; not a code bug
fix_applied: regenerated + redeployed 746 race pages (clean of dead tire links) + purged cache

what_broke: Preemptive port of the Roadie Labs Jul 22 incident: their immune digest raised 18 false findings (2 money-path-404 RED + 16 dead-link) that were SiteGround 202 + sg-captcha bot-challenge responses, not dead pages; this repo's identical check_links.py had the same blind spot
root_cause: check_links.py treated any non-200 as dead; SiteGround's WAF answers challenged bots with 202 + sg-captcha instead of the page
fix_applied: check_links.py detects 202/sg-captcha as a WAF challenge, retries with 20s/45s backoff, and reports still-challenged URLs in a separate WAF-CHALLENGED block (exit 0); immune_check.py surfaces that as one YELLOW live-check-challenged finding
regression_check: immune_check.py run_live_link_check() emits live-check-challenged (YELLOW/low) on a WAF-CHALLENGED block; real 404/500s still produce dead-link/money-path-404 because only 202+sg-captcha is classified as a challenge
verified: roadielabs.com fix verified live 2026-07-22 (312 URLs all alive, exit 0); same code path

what_broke: Adversarial GPT-5.6-sol review of the same-day WAF fix found confirmed defects: serial 65s-per-URL backoff could blow immune_check's 900s subprocess timeout (~11+ challenged URLs given this repo's crawl-delay overhead); checker crashes were silent greens (returncode/stderr ignored); 202-OR-sg-captcha classifier downgraded real 404/500s carrying the header; challenged-only runs exited 0 (weekly workflow false-green); count-only finding detail gave unstable/lossy baseline fingerprints; WAF block header counted duplicates its rows deduped. Corrects the prior entry's overstated claims.
root_cause: first-pass fix reviewed only by its author; per-URL serial backoff and count-only reporting were design errors
fix_applied: Classifier tightened to exactly status==202; scan-wide 180s retry-sleep budget; challenged-only scans exit 2 (weekly workflow red as 'inconclusive', documented in link-check.yml); immune_check validates returncode against parsed output and emits live-check-failed on crash/parse-drift; challenged finding lists deduped URLs; deduped WAF/dead counts; challenged-seed coverage loss stated in summary line. Same hardening in road-race-automation and nordic-race-automation.
regression_check: tests/test_immune_waf.py (11 tests): classifier 202-vs-404+header, retry budget consumption/exhaustion, budget-fits-900s-timeout invariant, and immune parse of mixed/challenged-only/crash/drift/clean checker output
verified: pytest tests/test_immune_waf.py 11 passed; roadielabs twin verified live same day (312 URLs alive, exit 0)
